title: Unakena Iruppen Lyrics Kadhal
stanzas:
Unakena iruppen
uyiraiyum koduppen
unnai naan pirinthaal
unakku mun irappaen.
kanmaniye..
kanmaniye..
azhuvathaen kanmaniye
vazhithunai naan irukka.

Unakena iruppen
uyiraiyum koduppen
unnai naan pirinthaal
unakku mun irappaen.

minsaara kambigal meedhu
mayinaakkal koodu kattum
nam kadhal thadaigalai
thaandum.

valaiyaamal nadhigal illai
valikkaamal vazhkai illai
varum kaalam kaayam aatrum.

nilavoliyai mattum andri
ilai ellaam vazhvathillai
minminiyum oli kodukkum.

thandhaiyum thaaiyaiyum
thaandi vandhaai
thozhiye endrume
irandumaai naan iruppen

tholile neeyume saayum podhu
edhirvarum thuyarangal
anaithaiyum naan edhirppen

venneeril nee kulikka
viragaagi thee kulippen
udhirathil unnai kalappen

vizhi moodum podhum unnai
piriyaamal naan irukka
kanavukkul kaaval iruppen

naan endraal naane illai
neethaane naanaai aanen.
nee azhuthaal naan thudippen.

Unakena iruppen
uyiraiyum koduppen
unnai naan pirinthaal
unakku mun irappaen.
kanmaniye..
kanmaniye..
azhuvathaen kanmaniye
vazhithunai naan irukka.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unakena Iruppen, the protagonist expresses deep emotional attachment and devotion to their beloved, promising to give their life for love. The song beautifully encapsulates the feelings of longing and the pain of separation, making it a poignant moment in the film Kadhal. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and tenderness, resonating with anyone who has loved deeply. This track stands out as a highlight in the movie, showcasing the complexities of love and emotional connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unakena Iruppen from Kadhal is a mesmerizing romantic ballad that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Haricharan's soulful vocals and Na Muthukumar's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love. The collaboration with music director Joshua Sridhar adds a unique charm, making it a timeless classic in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: I will be with you and give you my life. If I separate from you, I will feel pain before you. My dear.. my dear.. I will be there to support you without crying.
I will be with you and give you my life. If I separate from you, I will feel pain before you.
Tears will flow from the eyes. Will the heart of love bear it?
The flowers that bloom on the bushes, will the bees see them?
On the beautiful branches, our love will grow like a nest.
Without a net, there are no rivers; without a path, there is no life. Time will change everything.
Apart from the moonlight, there is no life; even the twinkling stars will give light.
You have come crossing over your father and mother, my friend, and I will be with you as two.
When you sleep, I will face all the troubles that come your way.
You bathe in the cool water, and I will burn in the fire of love, and I will embrace you in my heart.
When I close my eyes, I will be there without separation; I will be your protector in dreams.
If I say I am, I am not; I have become you. If you cry, I will feel it too.
I will be with you and give you my life. If I separate from you, I will feel pain before you. My dear.. my dear.. I will be there to support you without crying.
